commands: Remove or archive external_validation\pilot_smoke before official collection; pilot logs/videos must never be listed in external_validation\manifest.json
purpose: Quarantined first-panel smoke test for a real backend before full external collection.

work_orders.operator_input: --backend-module, accepted fidelity file, unsealed aliases, specific pilot run id
work_orders.title: Run strict collection readiness against quarantine output dirs

work_orders.evidence_boundary: quarantined smoke output; excluded from official manifest
work_orders.title: Collect the first 12-row method panel into pilot_smoke

work_orders.evidence_boundary: does not satisfy rollout or external evidence gates
work_orders.title: Audit pilot records, videos, run ids, and quarantine paths

work_orders.artifact: clean external_validation/logs and external_validation/videos before official run
work_orders.evidence_boundary: prevents pilot contamination of official evidence
work_orders.operator_input: operator confirmation that manifest will not include pilot paths
work_orders.title: Remove or archive pilot output before official collection
